revision.comment: Changed protection level for "[[Template:Pp-semi-indef]]": Allowing template editors on some templates with full protection dating back to pre-[[WP:TPROT|TPROT]] times which aren't too often or too sensitively used. ([Edit=Require template editor acces...

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
